abort.already_configured: This Google account is already configured.
abort.missing_configuration: The integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.

data.add_events: Add new events to Google Calendar
data.remove_events: Remove events no longer in the feed
data.title_case: Smart title case (normalize event title capitalization)

calendars.title: Manage Calendars
calendars.description: Select a calendar to manage its sources.

new_calendar.title: Set Up Calendar
new_calendar.description: Choose a Google Calendar to add sources to, or type a new calendar name (it will be created on first sync).

menu_options.remove_calendar: Remove all sources for this calendar

data.ics_urls_raw: ICS / iCal feed URLs (one per line)
data.prefix_text: Prefix text (e.g. Jax -, Jax, Team Name)
data.color_id: Event color ID (1-11, leave blank for default)
data.se_account_id: SportsEngine account (required when SE enrichment is enabled)

data.ics_urls_raw: ICS / iCal feed URLs (one per line)
data.prefix_text: Prefix text (e.g. Jax -, Jax, Team Name)

confirm_remove.title: Remove Source
confirm_remove.description: Remove **{source_label}**? Events already synced to Google Calendar will not be deleted.

remove_calendar.title: Remove Calendar Sources
remove_calendar.description: Remove **all sources** for **{calendar}**? Events already synced to Google Calendar will not be deleted. The Google Calendar itself will not be affected.

data.confirm: Yes, remove all sources for this calendar

data.prefix_text: Prefix text (e.g. Jax -, Jax, Team Name)
data.color_id: Event color ID (1-11, leave blank for default)

data.prefix_text: Prefix text (e.g. Jax -, Jax, Team Name)

confirm_remove_se_account.title: Remove SE Account
confirm_remove_se_account.description: Remove **{account_label}**? Sources assigned to this account will no longer be enriched.

data.location_abbreviations_raw: Location abbreviations (one per line: Venue Name = Short Name)
data.se_title_removals_raw: Title tokens to remove from all events (comma-separated)

source_shared.title: Add to Shareable Calendar?
source_shared.description: Optionally sync this source's events to one of your shareable Google Calendars. A display name entered here will be prepended to event titles only on the shared calendar.

data.shared_prefix: Display name on shared calendar (e.g. Jules, Jax)

shareable_cals.title: Shareable Google Calendars
shareable_cals.description: Select a shareable calendar to manage, or add a new one.

new_gcal_target.title: New Shareable Calendar
new_gcal_target.description: Choose an existing Google Calendar or type a new name. Events from the sources you select will be synced here without duplicating your source configuration.

gcal_target_source_prefixes.title: Display Names — {calendar}
gcal_target_source_prefixes.description: Select a source to set or change its display name on **{calendar}**. The current name (if any) is shown in parentheses.

gcal_target_source_prefix_edit.title: Display Name — {calendar}
gcal_target_source_prefix_edit.description:
**{source}**

Enter the name to show before this source's events on the shared calendar (e.g. Jules, Jax). Leave blank to remove the prefix.

gcal_target_sources.title: Included Sources — {calendar}
gcal_target_sources.description: Select the sources whose events should be synced to **{calendar}**. Sources remain configured under their primary calendars — no duplication required.

confirm_remove_gcal_target.title: Remove Shareable Calendar
confirm_remove_gcal_target.description: Stop syncing to **{calendar}**? Events already synced there will not be deleted. The Google Calendar itself will not be affected.

error.invalid_url: URL must start with http:// or https://
error.no_results: No tournaments found. Try a different search term.
error.no_divisions: Could not load divisions for this tournament. Try another.
error.no_teams: Could not load teams for this division. Try another.

se_login_failed.title: SportsEngine login failed
se_login_failed.description:
Could not log in to SportsEngine with the configured credentials. Field and location data will not be fetched until this is resolved.

Update your credentials in **Settings → Devices & Services → ICS GCal Sync → Configure → SportsEngine**.
